items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review` (Copilot skill) **Service directory:** `.github/skills/azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review/` **Triggered by:** PR #58577 by `@live1206` ## What Changed PR #58577 added two new files to the `azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review` skill: - `Check-MgmtNamingRules.ps1` — a 770-line PowerShell script implementing automated naming rule checks - `SKILL.md` — documentation describing the skill's phases and review checklist ## Gaps Found The "scanner emits these rule families" list in `SKILL.md` (Phase 2, step 3, lines 66–72) has the following issues: - **Wrong rule ID:** `DATETIME001` is listed, but the script uses `DATE001` (see `Check-MgmtNamingRules.ps1` line 337: `$ExcludeRules -notcontains 'DATE001'`). This means reviewers cannot correctly suppress the rule via `-ExcludeRules DATE001` if they follow the SKILL.md. - **Missing `TYPE001`:** The script implements a `TYPE001` rule ("string-typed properties that should use strong types", line 368) but it is not mentioned in the SKILL.md scanner list. - **Missing `ENUM001`:** The script implements `ENUM001` ("plural enum names should be singular", line 608) but it is absent from the SKILL.md scanner list. - **Missing `METHOD001`:** The script implements `METHOD001` ("ListOperations methods should be removed", line 664) but it is absent from the SKILL.md scanner list.
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files **File:** `.github/skills/azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review/SKILL.md` **Action:** Edit Locate the bullet list under the heading "The scanner currently emits these rule families" (currently lines 66–72). Replace the current list with the corrected, complete list: **Current (incorrect):** ```markdown The scanner currently emits these rule families (see "API Review Checklist" for details): - `SUFFIX001`–`SUFFIX010` – forbidden type-name suffixes (Parameters, Request, Options, Response, Data, Definition, Operation, Collection, **Update**, ...) - `RESINFIX001` – `Resource` infix in `*Data`/`*Collection` model names (with PrivateLinkResource exception) - `ACRONYM001` – curated acronyms in wrong casing (HTTP/TCP/SSL/TLS/...) - `ACRONYM002` – generic 3+ letter all-caps run inside a name (NNI, IPV, BFD, ...) - `ARMCOMMON001` – type duplicates an Azure.ResourceManager/Azure.Core common type (`OperationStatusResult`, `ManagedServiceIdentity*`, `TagsUpdate`, `ErrorResponse`, ...) - `BOOL001` / `DATETIME001` / `TTL001` – property naming ``` **Replacement (corrected):** ```markdown The scanner currently emits these rule families (see "API Review Checklist" for details): - `SUFFIX001`–`SUFFIX010` – forbidden type-name suffixes (Parameters, Request, Options, Response, Data, Definition, Operation, Collection, **Update**, ...) - `RESINFIX001` – `Resource` infix in `*Data`/`*Collection` model names (with PrivateLinkResource exception) - `ACRONYM001` – curated acronyms in wrong casing (HTTP/TCP/SSL/TLS/...) - `ACRONYM002` – generic 3+ letter all-caps run inside a name (NNI, IPV, BFD, ...) - `ARMCOMMON001` – type duplicates an Azure.ResourceManager/Azure.Core common type (`OperationStatusResult`, `ManagedServiceIdentity*`, `TagsUpdate`, `ErrorResponse`, ...) - `BOOL001` / `DATE001` / `TTL001` – property naming (bool prefix, DateTimeOffset ends with `On`/`At`, TTL renamed to `TimeToLiveIn`) - `TYPE001` – string-typed properties that should use a strong type (`Guid`, `ResourceIdentifier`, `ResourceType`, `ETag`, `AzureLocation`) - `ENUM001` – plural enum type names should be singular (unless bit flags) - `METHOD001` – `ListOperations` methods should be removed ``` ### Step 2: Validate Run a quick sanity check to confirm the rule IDs in the script match the updated documentation: ```bash grep -n "ExcludeRules -notcontains\|ExcludeRules -contains" .github/skills/azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review/Check-MgmtNamingRules.ps1 | grep -oP "'[A-Z]+\d+'" | sort -u ``` Confirm the output matches every rule ID listed in the updated SKILL.md scanner list.
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [azure-sdk-mgmt-pr-review] Docs: SKILL.md scanner rule list is incomplete and contains wrong rule ID
